violations.text: Wood is used in the construction of above the hand sink. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025
Mop sink faucet was observed leaking. Establishment is to fix leak. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet rooms must be self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025
Multiple ceiling tiles in the storefront area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026

Beans, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Beans were observed at 46 DF and voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Proper cooling methods reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025
The bathroom door was not in good repair. Establishment is to replace/repair door. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2026

Wood is used in the construction of above the hand sink and cooking line. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025
The door to the establishment's toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet rooms must be self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025
The dumpster was observed with an accumulation of debris. Dumpster areas must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025
Multiple ceiling tiles in the storefront area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026

Raw animal foods eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods vegetable and beef in the 1 door reach-in. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

Beef, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Beef was observed at 48 DF and was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

Various food was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

Dough packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
Frozen empanadas were being stored in trash bags. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the retail shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
